message:
refactor(sync/notify): migrate Notify waiters from std::sync::Mutex to parking_lot::Mutex

Replace std::sync::Mutex with parking_lot::Mutex for the Notify waiter
slab, eliminating poison handling boilerplate across all lock sites.

parking_lot::Mutex provides:
- No poisoning semantics (lock() returns the guard directly)
- Better performance under contention for short critical sections
- Consistent with the rest of the codebase's parking_lot usage

All five lock sites (notify_one, notify_all, waiter_count, Notified::poll
registration, and Notified::poll re-check) are simplified from the
match Ok/Err(poisoned) pattern to a direct .lock() call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
